channel.title: GitHub AL Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of AL in GitHub

item.title: microsoft/BCApps
item.description: Repository for collaboration on Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central applications.

item.title: microsoft/ALAppExtensions
item.description: Business Central extensibility requests only. New pull requests are no longer accepted; application contributions have moved to BCApps.

item.title: microsoft/BCQuality
item.description: Quality skills and knowledge for Business Central development. The shared bar for humans and agents alike.
